title: Evangelion Final Questions
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Final Questions... Post by facespace » Mon Nov 19, 2012 1:08 am I remember sometime around the release of the second rebuild film that Anno said that the fourth film will be a re-envisioning of the third film, now that the third film is out (I haven't seen it, and am not really gonna read the spoilers) is it gonna really be what Anno said? I am questioning this because the trailers at the end of 2.0 really had nothing to do with 3.0.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 19, 2012 1:23 am Not sure how far you're going to get with a thread in the no spoiler section. Not very, I wager, so I'm locking this. Wander into Q and Beyond for the preexisting thread for the final film.
